message:
Fix dead code warnings breaking CI builds

- Add #[allow(dead_code)] to deserialization structs that are only used
  for serde parsing: ClaudeUsage, ClaudeAccount, CodexAuthJson,
  CodexAuthTokens, JwtClaims, OpenAiAuthClaims, OpenAiOrganization,
  SubscriptionInfo, CodexUser
- Add #[allow(dead_code)] to unused render_header_segments method
- Fix mismatched lifetime syntax in format_status_segments

These structs exist for JSON deserialization where fields are accessed
via serde, not directly by code, so dead_code warnings are false positives.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -184,6 +184,7 @@ struct ClaudeRateLimit {
 
 #[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
 #[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")]
+#[allow(dead_code)]
 struct ClaudeUsage {
     #[serde(default)]
     input_tokens: Option<i64>,
@@ -193,6 +194,7 @@ struct ClaudeUsage {
 
 #[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
 #[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")]
+#[allow(dead_code)]
 struct ClaudeAccount {
     #[serde(default)]
     email: Option<String>,
